title: corydalis curviflora subsp. pseudosmithii
intro: Corydalis curviflora subsp. pseudosmithii is a subspecies of flowering plant in the poppy family, native to China, and is also known as Chinese yellow Corydalis. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Corydalis curviflora subsp. pseudosmithii include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved sleep quality, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often combined with other herbs and used in the form of capsules, tablets, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
